news_evidence.llm_reason: Primarily about Boston Scientific and medtech sector sentiment. Could cause modest sector rotation or sentiment spillover to Medtronic, but contains no Medtronic-specific material information expected to move MDT meaningfully in the next 1–10 trading days.

news_evidence.llm_reason: Retail-focused promotional piece recommending long-term buy-and-hold based on dividend history and past growth. No new earnings, guidance, regulatory, or transaction news. Likely to have minimal near-term impact beyond modest retail sentiment.
